name: Java CI

on: [push, pull_request]

env:
  # LocalStack dummy credentials (not real AWS credentials)
  AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID: localstack
  AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY: localstack
  AWS_DEFAULT_REGION: eu-central-1
  LOCALSTACK_VERSION: 3.0.2

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    services:
      localstack:
        image: localstack/localstack:3.0.2
        ports:
          - 4566:4566  # LocalStack unified endpoint (v0.11.0+)
          - 4571:4571  # Kinesis (legacy, if needed)
        env:
          SERVICES: kinesis,s3,dynamodb,sqs  # Specify needed services
          DEBUG: 1
          DATA_DIR: /tmp/localstack/data
        options: >-
          --health-cmd "awslocal kinesis list-streams || exit 1"
          --health-interval 10s
          --health-timeout 5s
          --health-retries 5
    
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    
    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: temurin
        java-version: '8'
    
    - name: Setup Gradle
      uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4
      with:
        cache-read-only: ${{ github.ref != 'refs/heads/main' && github.ref != 'refs/heads/master' }}
    
    - name: Verify LocalStack is ready
      run: |
        echo "Waiting for LocalStack to be ready..."
        for i in {1..30}; do
          if curl -s http://localhost:4566/_localstack/health | grep -q '"kinesis": "available"'; then
            echo "LocalStack is ready!"
            break
          fi
          echo "Waiting... ($i/30)"
          sleep 2
        done
        
        echo "LocalStack health status:"
        curl -s http://localhost:4566/_localstack/health | jq .
    
    - name: Make gradlew executable
      run: chmod +x gradlew
    
    - name: Run tests
      env:
        LOCALSTACK_ENDPOINT: http://localhost:4566
      run: ./gradlew check
    
    - name: Generate coverage report
      if: success()
      run: ./gradlew jacocoRootReport
    
    - name: Upload coverage to Codecov
      if: success()
      uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
      with:
        token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}
        files: ./build/reports/jacoco/jacocoRootReport/jacocoRootReport.xml
        fail_ci_if_error: false
        verbose: true
    
    - name: Upload test results
      if: always()
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
      with:
        name: test-results
        path: |
          **/build/reports/tests/
          **/build/test-results/
        retention-days: 7

  - openjdk8
os:
  - linux
sudo: required

  - chmod +x gradlew
  - ./gradlew wrapper --gradle-version 4.8.1
  - echo $TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER > $TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER/src/main/resources/build.txt
before_deploy:
  - git config --local user.name "PepperLola"
  - git config --local user.email "$GIT_EMAIL"
  - git tag -a $TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER -m "Automated beta build."
  - git push https://$GIT_TOKEN@github.com/PepperLola/playerinfo.git HEAD:master --follow-tags
deploy:
  provider: releases
  api_key: $GIT_TOKEN

if: tag IS blank

name: Java CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - master
      - main
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - master
      - main

permissions:
  contents: write  # Required for creating releases and pushing tags

env:
  BUILD_NUMBER: ${{ github.run_number }}

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      with:
        fetch-depth: 0  # Full history for proper git operations
    
    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: temurin
        java-version: '8'
    
    - name: Setup Gradle
      uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4
      with:
        gradle-version: 8.5  # Modern version, compatible with JDK 8
        cache-read-only: ${{ github.ref != 'refs/heads/master' && github.ref != 'refs/heads/main' }}
    
    - name: Make gradlew executable
      run: chmod +x gradlew
    
    - name: Create build number file
      run: |
        mkdir -p src/main/resources
        echo "$BUILD_NUMBER" > src/main/resources/build.txt
        cat src/main/resources/build.txt
    
    - name: Run tests
      run: ./gradlew test
    
    - name: Build artifacts
      run: ./gradlew build
    
    - name: Upload test results
      if: always()
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
      with:
        name: test-results
        path: |
          **/build/reports/tests/
          **/build/test-results/
        retention-days: 7
    
    - name: Create release and upload artifacts
      if: success() && github.event_name == 'push' && (github.ref == 'refs/heads/master' || github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') && github.repository == 'PepperLola/playerinfo'
      uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
      with:
        tag_name: build-${{ env.BUILD_NUMBER }}
        name: Beta Build ${{ env.BUILD_NUMBER }}
        body: |
          Automated beta build ${{ env.BUILD_NUMBER }}
          
          Commit: ${{ github.sha }}
          Branch: ${{ github.ref_name }}
        files: |
          build/libs/*.jar
        prerelease: true
        fail_on_unmatched_files: true
        generate_release_notes: true
      env:
        GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

input:
language: android
sudo: required
jdk: oraclejdk8

env:
  global:
  - ANDROID_API_LEVEL=26
  - ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS_VERSION=26.0.0
  - ANDROID_ABI=armeabi-v7a
  - ANDROID_ABI=X86
  - ANDROID_ABI=ARMEABI_V7A

android:
  components:
    - tools
    - build-tools-$ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS_VERSION
    - android-$ANDROID_API_LEVEL
    - extra-android-m2repository
  licenses:
    - yes | sudo sdkmanager --licenses
    - 'android-sdk-preview-license-52d11cd2'
    - 'android-sdk-license-.+'
    - 'google-gdk-license-.+'

before_install:  
  - yes | sdkmanager "platforms;android-26"
  - yes | sdkmanager "build-tools;26.0.0"
  - yes | sdkmanager "platforms;android-28"
  - yes | sdkmanager "build-tools;28.0.3"

before_cache:
  - rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
  - rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

cache:
  directories:
  - $HOME/.gradle/caches/
  - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/
  - $HOME/.android/build-cache

before_script:
  - chmod +x gradlew

script:
  - ./gradlew clean build
  - ./gradlew test

deploy:
  provider: releases
  api-key: $GITHUB_API_KEY
  file: $TRAVIS_BUILD_DIR/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk
  skip_cleanup: true
  name: PojavLauncher_DevBuild-$TRAVIS_COMMIT
  body: Automatic build of PojavLauncher from the latest source commit ($TRAVIS_COMMIT) built by Travis CI on $(date +'%F %T %Z').
  prerelease: true
  overwrite: true
  target_commitish: $TRAVIS_COMMIT
  on: [push]
output:
name: Android CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - master
      - develop
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
      - master

env:
  ANDROID_API_LEVEL: 33
  ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS_VERSION: 33.0.2

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      
      - name: Set up JDK 17
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '17'
      
      - name: Setup Gradle
        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4
        with:
          cache-read-only: ${{ github.ref != 'refs/heads/main' && github.ref != 'refs/heads/master' }}
      
      - name: Accept Android SDK licenses
        run: yes | sdkmanager --licenses || true
      
      - name: Install Android SDK components
        run: |
          sdkmanager "build-tools;${{ env.ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS_VERSION }}"
          sdkmanager "platforms;android-${{ env.ANDROID_API_LEVEL }}"
          sdkmanager --list_installed
      
      - name: Make gradlew executable
        run: chmod +x gradlew
      
      - name: Build with Gradle
        run: ./gradlew clean build
      
      - name: Run tests
        run: ./gradlew test
      
      - name: Upload test results
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: test-results
          path: |
            **/build/reports/tests/
            **/build/test-results/
          retention-days: 7
      
      - name: Upload APK artifacts
        if: success()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: apk-builds
          path: |
            **/build/outputs/apk/**/*.apk
          retention-days: 7
      
      - name: Create development release
        if: success() && github.event_name == 'push' && (github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || github.ref == 'refs/heads/master')
        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
        with:
          tag_name: dev-build-${{ github.run_number }}
          name: Development Build ${{ github.run_number }}
          body: |
            Automatic development build of PojavLauncher
            
            **Commit:** ${{ github.sha }}
            **Branch:** ${{ github.ref_name }}
            **Build Date:** ${{ github.event.head_commit.timestamp }}
            **Commit Message:** ${{ github.event.head_commit.message }}
          files: |
            app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk
          prerelease: true
          fail_on_unmatched_files: true
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

input:
language: java
dist: xenial
sudo: false

jdk:
  - openjdk8
  - openjdk11

env:
  - PROFILES=headless-mode
  - PROFILES=headless-mode,chrome

before_install:
  - sudo apt-get -y install firefox-geckodriver
install:
  - git clone https://github.com/primefaces/primefaces && cd primefaces && mvn install && cd ..
  - git clone https://github.com/primefaces-extensions/primefaces-selenium && cd primefaces-selenium && mvn install && cd ..
script:
  - ln -s /usr/bin/geckodriver geckodriver
  - source .travis/install-chromedriver.sh
  - mvn -B -V clean install -P${PROFILES}

addons:
  apt:
    update: true
cache:
  directories:
    - "$HOME/.m2/repository"
output:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      max-parallel: 2
      matrix:
        jdk: ['11', '17']
        profiles: ['headless-mode', 'headless-mode,chrome']
    
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      
      - name: Set up JDK ${{ matrix.jdk }}
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: ${{ matrix.jdk }}
          cache: maven
      
      - name: Setup Chrome and ChromeDriver
        uses: browser-actions/setup-chrome@v1
        with:
          chrome-version: stable
      
      - name: Setup Firefox and GeckoDriver
        uses: browser-actions/setup-firefox@v1
        with:
          firefox-version: latest
      
      - name: Verify browser installations
        run: |
          google-chrome --version
          chromedriver --version
          firefox --version
          geckodriver --version
      
      - name: Cache PrimeFaces dependencies
        id: cache-primefaces
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/primefaces-install
            ~/.m2/repository/org/primefaces
          key: primefaces-deps-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}-v1
      
      - name: Clone and install PrimeFaces
        if: steps.cache-primefaces.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/primefaces/primefaces
          cd primefaces
          mvn install -DskipTests
          cd ..
          mkdir -p ~/primefaces-install
          touch ~/primefaces-install/.installed
      
      - name: Clone and install PrimeFaces Selenium
        if: steps.cache-primefaces.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/primefaces-extensions/primefaces-selenium
          cd primefaces-selenium
          mvn install -DskipTests
          cd ..
      
      - name: Build and test with Maven
        run: mvn -B -V clean install -P${{ matrix.profiles }}
      
      - name: Upload test results
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: test-results-jdk${{ matrix.jdk }}-${{ matrix.profiles }}
          path: |
            **/target/surefire-reports/
            **/target/failsafe-reports/
          retention-days: 7
      
      - name: Upload build artifacts
        if: success()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-jdk${{ matrix.jdk }}-${{ matrix.profiles }}
          path: |
            **/target/*.jar
            **/target/*.war
          retention-days: 7

language: java

env:
  global:
  - SMALLD_VERSION="$(git describe --dirty --tags)-SNAPSHOT"
  - MAVEN_OPTS="-Drevision=$SMALLD_VERSION -Dproperty=revision -DnewVersion=$SMALLD_VERSION -DgenerateBackupPoms=false"

addons:
  sonarcloud:
    organization: "ianagbip1oti-github"

before_install:
- 'if [ "$TRAVIS_PULL_REQUEST" = "false" ]; then bash ./etc/extract_secrets.sh; fi'

stages:
- build
- name: release
  if: tag =~ ^\d+\.\d+\.\d+$
  
jobs:
  include:
    - stage: build
      jdk: oraclejdk8
      script: mvn -B verify
    - jdk: oraclejdk9
      script: mvn -B verify
    - jdk: openjdk8
      script: mvn -B verify
    - stage: release
      jdk: openjdk8
      env:
        - SMALLD_VERSION=$(git describe --dirty --tags)
        - MAVEN_OPTS="-Drevision=$SMALLD_VERSION -Dproperty=revision -DnewVersion=$SMALLD_VERSION -DgenerateBackupPoms=false"
      script: mvn -s etc/settings.xml -B versions:set-property deploy -P release
output:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

env:
  MAVEN_OPTS: -Drevision=${{ github.ref_name }}-SNAPSHOT -Dproperty=revision -DnewVersion=${{ github.ref_name }}-SNAPSHOT -DgenerateBackupPoms=false

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        jdk: ['8', '9']
        include:
          - jdk: '8'
            distribution: temurin
          - jdk: '9'
            distribution: temurin
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Set up JDK ${{ matrix.jdk }}
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: ${{ matrix.distribution }}
          java-version: ${{ matrix.jdk }}
      - name: Extract secrets
        if: github.event_name != 'pull_request'
        run: bash ./etc/extract_secrets.sh
      - name: Build and verify
        run: mvn -B verify
      - name: Run SonarCloud analysis
        if: matrix.jdk == '8'
        run: mvn -B sonar:sonar
        env:
          SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }}
          SONAR_ORGANIZATION: ianagbip1oti-github

  release:
    needs: build
    if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/') && github.ref_name != '' && contains(github.ref_name, '.')
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Extract secrets
        run: bash ./etc/extract_secrets.sh
      - name: Set version and deploy
        run: mvn -s etc/settings.xml -B versions:set-property deploy -P release
        env:
          MAVEN_OPTS: -Drevision=${{ github.ref_name }} -Dproperty=revision -DnewVersion=${{ github.ref_name }} -DgenerateBackupPoms=false

sudo: false
install: true

addons:
  sonarcloud:
    organization: "radixdlt-github"
    token: ${SONAR_TOKEN}

jdk:
  - openjdk11

git:
  depth: false

jobs:
  include:
    - stage: check
      script: ./gradlew check jacocoTestReport sonarqube --info --refresh-dependencies
    - stage: integration
      script: ./gradlew integrationTest --refresh-dependencies

before_cache:
  - rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
  - rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

cache:
  directories:
    - '$HOME/.m2/repository'
    - '$HOME/.sonar/cache'
    - '$HOME/.gradle'
    - '.gradle'

env:
  - TEST_DURATION=30s
output:
name: Java CI

on: [push, pull_request]

env:
  TEST_DURATION: 30s

jobs:
  setup:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 11
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '11'
      - name: Setup Gradle
        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4
      - name: Build
        run: ./gradlew assemble --info
      - name: Upload build
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build
          path: '**/build/'

  check:
    needs: setup
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Download build
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build
      - name: Run checks
        run: ./gradlew check jacocoTestReport sonarqube --info

  integration:
    needs: [setup, check]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Download build
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build
      - name: Run integration tests
        run: ./gradlew integrationTest --info

sudo: false
language: java
jdk:
- oraclejdk8

output:
name: Java CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      SONATYPE_USERNAME: ralscha23
      SONATYPE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SONATYPE_PASSWORD }}
    
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: temurin
        java-version: '8'

    - name: Cache Maven repository
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: ~/.m2/repository
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-m2-

    - name: Build with Maven
      run: mvn install

    - name: After success
      if: success()
      run: |
        python addsettings.py
        mvn clean deploy -DskipTests=true --settings ~/.m2/mySettings.xml

language: java

- openjdk8

before_cache:
- rm -rf $HOME/.m2/repository/**/*-SNAPSHOT

  directories:
  - "$HOME/.m2/repository"
  - "$HOME/.m2/wrapper"

notifications:
  email: true

name: Java CI

on: [push, pull_request]

  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: temurin
        java-version: '8'

    - name: Cache Maven
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: |
          ~/.m2/repository
          ~/.m2/wrapper
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-m2-

    - name: Build quarkus.jdt.ext
      run: cd quarkus.jdt.ext && ./mvnw clean verify

    - name: Build quarkus.ls.ext
      run: cd quarkus.ls.ext/com.redhat.quarkus.ls && ./mvnw clean verify

    - name: Clean SNAPSHOT artifacts
      if: always()
      run: rm -rf $HOME/.m2/repository/**/*-SNAPSHOT

input:
language: android
sudo: required

before_cache:
  - rm -f $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
  - rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/
cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.gradle/caches/
    - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/

env:
  global:
    - COMPILE_SDK_VERSION=29 # Same as `compileSdkVersion` in build.gradle
    - EMULATOR_API=22
    - BUILD_TOOLS_VERSION=28.0.3 # Same as `buildToolsVersion` in build.gradle
    - ABI=armeabi-v7a # ARM ABI v7a by default
    - ADB_INSTALL_TIMEOUT=5 # minutes

android:
  components:
    - tools # Update android-sdk (also called android-sdk-tools)
    - platform-tools
    - tools # Write the second time to update to the newest as described in the document
    - build-tools-${BUILD_TOOLS_VERSION} # For building
    - android-${COMPILE_SDK_VERSION} # For building
    - android-${EMULATOR_API} # For testing

    - extra-android-m2repository # Support library

    - sys-img-${ABI}-android-${EMULATOR_API} # Emulator image

notifications:
  email: false

before_install:
  - chmod +x gradlew
    #- yes | sdkmanager "platforms;android-27" # Workaround from https://github.com/travis-ci/travis-ci/issues/8879

install:
  - sdkmanager --list || true
  - echo yes | sdkmanager "extras;m2repository;com;android;support;constraint;constraint-layout;1.0.2" #&> /dev/null
  - echo yes | sdkmanager "extras;m2repository;com;android;support;constraint;constraint-layout-solver;1.0.2" #&> /dev/null
  - avdmanager --list || true # See below "avdmanager"

before_script:
    #  - echo no | avdmanager create avd -n test -k android-${EMULATOR_API} -f --abi ${ABI} --tag "$TAG"
  - echo no | android create avd --force -n test -t android-${EMULATOR_API} --abi ${ABI} # avdmanager is not available (?) (see https://github.com/travis-ci/packer-templates/issues/482 )
  - emulator -avd test -no-audio -no-window &
  - android-wait-for-emulator
  - adb shell input keyevent 82 &

script:
  - ./gradlew assembleRelease
  - ./gradlew jacocoTestReport
  - ./gradlew connectedCheck

after_success:
  - bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)
output:
name: Android CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      COMPILE_SDK_VERSION: 29
      EMULATOR_API: 22
      BUILD_TOOLS_VERSION: 28.0.3
      ABI: armeabi-v7a
      ADB_INSTALL_TIMEOUT: 5

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'

    - name: Set up Android SDK
      uses: android-actions/setup-android@v3

    - name: Cache Gradle
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: |
          ~/.gradle/caches/
          ~/.gradle/wrapper/
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-

    - name: Prepare Gradle
      run: chmod +x gradlew

    - name: Install Android components
      run: |
        sdkmanager --list || true
        echo yes | sdkmanager "tools" "platform-tools" "build-tools;${BUILD_TOOLS_VERSION}" "platforms;android-${COMPILE_SDK_VERSION}" "platforms;android-${EMULATOR_API}" "extras;android;m2repository" "system-images;android-${EMULATOR_API};default;${ABI}"
        echo yes | sdkmanager "extras;m2repository;com;android;support;constraint;constraint-layout;1.0.2"
        echo yes | sdkmanager "extras;m2repository;com;android;support;constraint;constraint-layout-solver;1.0.2"
        avdmanager --list || true

    - name: Start emulator
      run: |
        echo no | avdmanager create avd --force -n test -k "system-images;android-${EMULATOR_API};default;${ABI}" --abi ${ABI}
        emulator -avd test -no-audio -no-window &
        adb wait-for-device shell 'while [[ -z $(getprop sys.boot_completed) ]]; do sleep 1; done'
        adb shell input keyevent 82 &

    - name: Assemble
      run: ./gradlew assembleRelease

    - name: Jacoco
      run: ./gradlew jacocoTestReport

    - name: Instrumented tests
      run: ./gradlew connectedCheck

    - name: Upload coverage
      uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4

    - name: Cleanup Gradle cache
      if: always()
      run: |
        rm -f $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
        rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

language: java

jobs:
  include:
    - name: jdk11
      jdk: openjdk11
      script: ./gradlew check -i

    - name: example
      jdk: openjdk11
      before_install: |
        if .travis/build_condition.sh $TRAVIS_COMMIT_RANGE examples/example; then
          echo "Testing";
        else
          echo "NOT testing" && travis_terminate 0;
        fi
      script:
        - cd ./examples/example/
        - ./gradlew check -i
        - cd ../..

after_success:
  - bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)

before_cache:
  - rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
  - rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.gradle/caches/
    - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/

branches:
  only: 
    - master
output:
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - master
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - master

jobs:
  jdk11:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      
      - name: Set up JDK 11
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: '11'
          cache: 'gradle'
      
      - name: Make gradlew executable
        run: chmod +x gradlew
      
      - name: Run check
        run: ./gradlew check -i
      
      - name: Cleanup Gradle Cache
        if: always()
        run: |
          rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
          rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

  example:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      
      - name: Set up JDK 11
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: '11'
          cache: 'gradle'
      
      - name: Check if testing is needed
        id: check
        run: |
          if .travis/build_condition.sh ${{ github.event.before }}..${{ github.sha }} examples/example; then
            echo "Testing"
            echo "skip=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            echo "NOT testing"
            echo "skip=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi
      
      - name: Make gradlew executable
        if: steps.check.outputs.skip != 'true'
        run: chmod +x examples/example/gradlew
      
      - name: Run example check
        if: steps.check.outputs.skip != 'true'
        working-directory: ./examples/example/
        run: ./gradlew check -i
      
      - name: Cleanup Gradle Cache
        if: always()
        run: |
          rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
          rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/
  
  upload-coverage:
    needs: [jdk11, example]
    if: always()
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      
      - name: Upload coverage to Codecov
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4

env:
  global:
    - secure: "the base64 string from when you encrypted OSSRH_JIRA_USERNAME"
    - # ^^ OSSRH_JIRA_USERNAME
    - secure: "the base64 string from when you encrypted OSSRH_JIRA_PASSWORD"
    - # ^^ OSSRH_JIRA_PASSWORD
    - secure: "the base64 string from when you encrypted GPG_KEY_NAME"
    - # ^^ GPG_KEY_NAME
    - secure: "the base64 string from when you encrypted GPG_PASSPHRASE"
    - # ^^ GPG_PASSPHRASE

  - openjdk8
  
script:
  - mvn verify

after_success:
  - mvn clean test jacoco:report coveralls:report

  - release/createReleaseProperties.sh
  - echo $GPG_SECRET_KEYS | base64 --decode | gpg --import
  - echo $GPG_OWNERTRUST | base64 --decode | gpg --import-ownertrust
  - gpg -v --keyserver hkp://p80.pool.sks-keyservers.net:80 --refresh-keys
  - gpg -v --list-keys

  provider: script
  script: mvn -X release:perform --settings release/mvnsettings.xml -Darguments="-DskipTests"
  skip_cleanup: true
  on:
    tags: true

name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

env:
  OSSRH_JIRA_USERNAME: ${{ secrets.OSSRH_JIRA_USERNAME }}
  OSSRH_JIRA_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.OSSRH_JIRA_PASSWORD }}
  GPG_KEY_NAME: ${{ secrets.GPG_KEY_NAME }}
  GPG_PASSPHRASE: ${{ secrets.GPG_PASSPHRASE }}

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: '8'
          cache: 'maven'
      
      - name: Build and verify
        run: mvn verify
      
      - name: Generate and upload coverage
        run: mvn clean test jacoco:report coveralls:report

  deploy:
    if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: '8'
          cache: 'maven'
      
      - name: Prepare release
        run: |
          release/createReleaseProperties.sh
          echo ${{ secrets.GPG_SECRET_KEYS }} | base64 --decode | gpg --import
          echo ${{ secrets.GPG_OWNERTRUST }} | base64 --decode | gpg --import-ownertrust
          gpg -v --keyserver hkp://p80.pool.sks-keyservers.net:80 --refresh-keys
          gpg -v --list-keys
      
      - name: Deploy release
        env:
          OSSRH_JIRA_USERNAME: ${{ secrets.OSSRH_JIRA_USERNAME }}
          OSSRH_JIRA_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.OSSRH_JIRA_PASSWORD }}
          GPG_KEY_NAME: ${{ secrets.GPG_KEY_NAME }}
          GPG_PASSPHRASE: ${{ secrets.GPG_PASSPHRASE }}
        run: mvn -X release:perform --settings release/mvnsettings.xml -Darguments="-DskipTests"

   && unzip -q apache-maven-3.2.5-bin.zip
   && export M2_HOME=$PWD/apache-maven-3.2.5
   && export PATH=$M2_HOME/bin:$PATH
   && cp ./.middleware-common/.travis.settings.xml $HOME/.m2/settings.xml
   && mvn -version

output:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        jdk: ['8', '7']
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      
      - name: Set up JDK ${{ matrix.jdk }}
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: ${{ matrix.jdk }}
          cache: 'maven'
      
      - name: Download and setup Maven 3.2.5
        run: |
          echo "Downloading Maven 3.2.5"
          wget https://archive.apache.org/dist/maven/maven-3/3.2.5/binaries/apache-maven-3.2.5-bin.zip
          unzip -q apache-maven-3.2.5-bin.zip
          echo "$PWD/apache-maven-3.2.5/bin" >> $GITHUB_PATH
          cp ./.middleware-common/.travis.settings.xml $HOME/.m2/settings.xml
          $PWD/apache-maven-3.2.5/bin/mvn -version
      
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: mvn clean install -DskipTests=true -Dmaven.javadoc.skip=true -B -V
      
      - name: Check format
        run: sh ./.middleware-common/check_format.sh
      
      - name: Run tests with coverage
        run: mvn cobertura:cobertura
      
      - name: Upload coverage artifact
        if: matrix.jdk == '8'
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage-data
          path: '**/target/site/cobertura/'

  upload-coverage:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      
      - name: Download coverage artifact
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage-data
      
      - name: Upload coverage to Codecov
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4

        run: ./mvnw clean deploy -nsu
      
      - name: Build
        if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'

sudo: false

language: java

cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.m2

install:
  - mvn install -DfinalName=release -DskipTests=true -Dmaven.javadoc.skip=true -B -V

deploy:
  provider: releases
  api_key:

  file: target/release.jar

  # Modify this to build on every commit
  on:
    tags: true
output:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: '8'
          cache: 'maven'
      
      - name: Install
        run: mvn install -DfinalName=release -DskipTests=true -Dmaven.javadoc.skip=true -B -V
      
      - name: Run tests
        run: mvn test -B
      
      - name: Upload artifact
        if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: release-jar
          path: target/release.jar

  deploy:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
    steps:
      - name: Download artifact
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: release-jar
      
      - name: Deploy to GitHub Releases
        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
        with:
          files: release.jar

services:

  include:
    - stage: tests
      script:
        - "mvn jacoco:prepare-agent surefire:test jacoco:report sonar:sonar"
    - stage: build
      script:
        - "mvn clean compile assembly:single"
    - stage: deploy-docker-dev
      script:
        - "cp .travis.settings.xml $HOME/.m2/settings.xml && mvn clean compile assembly:single docker:build -DpushImage"
    - stage: deploy-dev
      script:
        - "sed -i \"s/LIVE/${TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER}/g\" pom.xml"

  tests:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: '8'
          cache: 'maven'
      
      - name: Run tests and SonarQube analysis
        env:
          SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }}
          SONAR_ORGANIZATION: twasi
        run: mvn jacoco:prepare-agent surefire:test jacoco:report sonar:sonar

  build:
    needs: tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: '8'
          cache: 'maven'
      
      - name: Build
        run: mvn clean compile assembly:single

  deploy-docker-dev:
    needs: build
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/dev' && github.event_name == 'push'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: '8'
          cache: 'maven'
      
      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3
      
      - name: Build and push Docker image
        run: |
          cp .travis.settings.xml $HOME/.m2/settings.xml
          mvn clean compile assembly:single docker:build -DpushImage

  deploy-dev:
    needs: build
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/dev' && github.event_name == 'push'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: '8'
          cache: 'maven'
      
      - name: Update version
        run: sed -i "s/LIVE/${{ github.run_number }}/g" pom.xml
      
      - name: Deploy
        run: |
          cp .travis.settings.xml $HOME/.m2/settings.xml
          mvn clean compile assembly:single deploy

language: java
dist: trusty
sudo: false
install: true

git:
  depth: false

jdk:
  - oraclejdk8

script:
  - 'if [ "$TRAVIS_PULL_REQUEST" = "false" ]; then mvn clean verify sonar:sonar -Pcoverage; fi'
  - 'if [ "$TRAVIS_PULL_REQUEST" != "false" ]; then mvn clean install; fi'

cache:

    - '$HOME/.m2/repository'

    organization: "utarwyn-github"
output:
name: Java CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      with:
        fetch-depth: 0

    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'
        cache: 'maven'

    - name: Cache SonarCloud
      if: github.event_name != 'pull_request'
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: ~/.sonar/cache
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-sonar-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-sonar-

    - name: Build and Sonar on push
      if: github.event_name != 'pull_request'
      env:
        SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }}
        SONAR_ORGANIZATION: utarwyn-github
      run: mvn clean verify sonar:sonar -Pcoverage -Dsonar.organization=utarwyn-github

    - name: Build on pull request
      if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
      run: mvn clean install

input:
language: java
branches:
  only:
  - master
  - /^\d+\.\d+$/
cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.m2
before_cache:
  - rm -rf $HOME/.m2/repository/io/vertx/
jobs:
  include:
    - stage: test
      name: "OpenJDK 8"
      jdk: openjdk8
      script: mvn -q clean verify -B
    - if: type != pull_request
      name: "OpenJDK 11"
      jdk: openjdk11
      script: mvn -q clean verify -B
    - name: "Apollo Link tests"
      jdk: openjdk8
      before_script:
        - cd vertx-web-graphql
        - mvn exec:java -Dexec.mainClass=io.vertx.ext.web.handler.graphql.ApolloTestsServer -Dexec.classpathScope=test > ${HOME}/ApolloTestsServer.log 2>&1 &
        - echo $! > ${HOME}/ApolloTestsServer.pid
        - ( tail -f ${HOME}/ApolloTestsServer.log & ) | grep -q "Apollo tests server started"
      script:
        - cd tests/apollo
        - npm install
        - npm run test
      after_failure: cat ${HOME}/ApolloTestsServer.log
      after_script: cat ${HOME}/ApolloTestsServer.pid | xargs kill -9
    - stage: deploy
      name: "Deploy to Sonatype's snapshots repository"
      jdk: openjdk8
      if: type != pull_request AND env(SONATYPE_NEXUS_USERNAME) IS present
      script: bash .travis.deploy.artifacts.sh
notifications:
  email:
    recipients:
      - secure: "Q9QVThuDW0VF6OAcaeFbdOZrK8DBoaDw4GVqDukbgPWyjoJN/KTifxFYIJGDsYva5gZp9OKyeTe3cYC0MBlX2SMlJbU83HkApl3EKmM6QGgFVGbRZAjX0LVX5sGhlqfcyjiYedORlTLeEuJfbiYoPoEfQ1dR8cEPSCdInA+mgb0="
    on_success: always
    on_failure: always
output:
name: Java CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - master
      - '[0-9]*.[0-9]*'
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - master
      - '[0-9]*.[0-9]*'

jobs:
  test_jdk8:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    
    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'
        cache: 'maven'
    
    - name: Build
      run: mvn -q clean verify -B
    
    - name: Clean vertx artifacts from cache
      if: always()
      run: rm -rf $HOME/.m2/repository/io/vertx/

  test_jdk11:
    if: github.event_name != 'pull_request'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    
    - name: Set up JDK 11
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '11'
        cache: 'maven'
    
    - name: Build
      run: mvn -q clean verify -B
    
    - name: Clean vertx artifacts from cache
      if: always()
      run: rm -rf $HOME/.m2/repository/io/vertx/

  apollo_link_tests:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    
    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'
        cache: 'maven'
    
    - name: Set up Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v4
      with:
        node-version: 'lts/*'
    
    - name: Start Apollo tests server
      run: |
        cd vertx-web-graphql
        mvn exec:java -Dexec.mainClass=io.vertx.ext.web.handler.graphql.ApolloTestsServer -Dexec.classpathScope=test > ${HOME}/ApolloTestsServer.log 2>&1 &
        echo $! > ${HOME}/ApolloTestsServer.pid
        ( tail -f ${HOME}/ApolloTestsServer.log & ) | grep -q "Apollo tests server started"
    
    - name: Run Apollo Link tests
      run: |
        cd vertx-web-graphql/tests/apollo
        npm install
        npm run test
    
    - name: Server log on failure
      if: failure()
      run: cat ${HOME}/ApolloTestsServer.log
    
    - name: Stop Apollo tests server
      if: always()
      run: cat ${HOME}/ApolloTestsServer.pid | xargs kill -9 || true
    
    - name: Clean vertx artifacts from cache
      if: always()
      run: rm -rf $HOME/.m2/repository/io/vertx/

  deploy_snapshots:
    needs: [test_jdk8, apollo_link_tests]
    if: github.event_name != 'pull_request'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    
    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'
        cache: 'maven'
    
    - name: Make deploy script executable
      run: chmod +x .travis.deploy.artifacts.sh
    
    - name: Deploy to Sonatype snapshots
      if: env.SONATYPE_NEXUS_USERNAME != ''
      env:
        SONATYPE_NEXUS_USERNAME: ${{ secrets.SONATYPE_NEXUS_USERNAME }}
        SONATYPE_NEXUS_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SONATYPE_NEXUS_PASSWORD }}
      run: bash .travis.deploy.artifacts.sh
    
    - name: Clean vertx artifacts from cache
      if: always()
      run: rm -rf $HOME/.m2/repository/io/vertx/

input:
sudo: required
services:
  - docker
  - postgresql
language: java
jdk: oraclejdk8
before_script:
  - curl -L https://codeclimate.com/downloads/test-reporter/test-reporter-latest-linux-amd64 > ./cc-test-reporter
  - chmod +x ./cc-test-reporter
  - ./cc-test-reporter before-build
  - psql -c 'create database events;' -U postgres
script:
  - "./gradlew clean build jacocoTestReport jacocoFix -PbuildNumber=$TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER --scan"
  - docker build --no-cache --pull -t wisvch/events:$TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER .
after_success:
  - if [ "${TRAVIS_PULL_REQUEST_BRANCH:-$TRAVIS_BRANCH}" == "master" ]; then
    docker login -u="$DOCKER_USERNAME" -p="$DOCKER_PASSWORD";
    docker push wisvch/events:$TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER;
    fi
after_script:
  - cd src/main/java/
  - ../../../cc-test-reporter format-coverage -d -t jacoco
  - ../../../cc-test-reporter upload-coverage -d
notifications:
  slack: false
  email: false
output:
name: Java CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER: ${{ github.run_number }}
    services:
      postgres:
        image: postgres:13
        env:
          POSTGRES_USER: postgres
          POSTGRES_HOST_AUTH_METHOD: trust
        ports:
          - 5432:5432
        options: >-
          --health-cmd="pg_isready -U postgres"
          --health-interval=10s
          --health-timeout=5s
          --health-retries=5

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'
        cache: 'gradle'

    - name: Code Climate before build
      env:
        CC_TEST_REPORTER_ID: ${{ secrets.CC_TEST_REPORTER_ID }}
      run: |
        curl -L https://codeclimate.com/downloads/test-reporter/test-reporter-latest-linux-amd64 > ./cc-test-reporter
        chmod +x ./cc-test-reporter
        ./cc-test-reporter before-build

    - name: Create database
      run: psql -c 'create database events;' -U postgres -h 127.0.0.1

    - name: Make gradlew executable
      run: chmod +x gradlew

    - name: Build with Gradle
      run: ./gradlew clean build jacocoTestReport jacocoFix -PbuildNumber=$TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER --scan

    - name: Build Docker image
      run: docker build --no-cache --pull -t wisvch/events:$TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER .

    - name: Push Docker image on master
      if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/master' && github.event_name == 'push'
      env:
        DOCKER_USERNAME: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_USERNAME }}
        DOCKER_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_PASSWORD }}
      run: |
        echo "$DOCKER_PASSWORD" | docker login -u "$DOCKER_USERNAME" --password-stdin
        docker push wisvch/events:$TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER

    - name: Code Climate after build
      if: always()
      env:
        CC_TEST_REPORTER_ID: ${{ secrets.CC_TEST_REPORTER_ID }}
      run: |
        cd src/main/java/
        ../../../cc-test-reporter format-coverage -d -t jacoco
        ../../../cc-test-reporter upload-coverage -d

language: java
git:
  depth: false

addons:
  apt:
    packages:
      - docker-ce
services:
  - docker

before_cache:
  - rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock

cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/
    - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/

jobs:
  include:
    - stage: deploy
      script: skip
      deploy:
        provider: script
        skip_cleanup: true
        on:
          tags: true
        script: ./gradlew publishPlugins -Pgradle.publish.key=$GRADLE_PUBLISH_KEY -Pgradle.publish.secret=$GRADLE_PUBLISH_SECRET -x check

stages:
  - test
  - deploy

  - GRADLE_INTEGRATION_TEST_VERSIONS=5.3,5.6 PUBLISH_SONAR=true
  - GRADLE_INTEGRATION_TEST_VERSIONS=6.0,6.6

before_script:
  - 'bash -c "docker pull alfresco/alfresco-content-repository-community:6.0.7-ga& docker pull tomcat:7-jre8& docker pull hello-world& docker pull alpine:edge&"'

script:
  - >
    GRADLE_ARGS="check -i -PintegrationTestGradleVersions=$GRADLE_INTEGRATION_TEST_VERSIONS";
    if [[ "$PUBLISH_SONAR" == "true" && "$TRAVIS_SECURE_ENV_VARS" == "true" ]]; then
      GRADLE_ARGS="${GRADLE_ARGS} sonarqube -Dsonar.projectKey=xenit-eu_alfresco-docker-gradle-plugin -Dsonar.organization=xenit-eu -Dsonar.host.url=https://sonarcloud.io -Dsonar.login=$SONAR_TOKEN"
    fi;

name: Java CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        include:
          - GRADLE_INTEGRATION_TEST_VERSIONS: '5.3,5.6'
            PUBLISH_SONAR: 'true'
          - GRADLE_INTEGRATION_TEST_VERSIONS: '6.0,6.6'
            PUBLISH_SONAR: 'false'
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      with:
        fetch-depth: 0

    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'
        cache: 'gradle'

    - name: Prepull Docker images
      run: bash -c "docker pull alfresco/alfresco-content-repository-community:6.0.7-ga& docker pull tomcat:7-jre8& docker pull hello-world& docker pull alpine:edge&"

    - name: Make gradlew executable
      run: chmod +x gradlew

    - name: Build
      env:
        GRADLE_INTEGRATION_TEST_VERSIONS: ${{ matrix.GRADLE_INTEGRATION_TEST_VERSIONS }}
        PUBLISH_SONAR: ${{ matrix.PUBLISH_SONAR }}
        SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }}
      run: |
        GRADLE_ARGS="check -i -PintegrationTestGradleVersions=$GRADLE_INTEGRATION_TEST_VERSIONS"
        if [[ "$PUBLISH_SONAR" == "true" && -n "$SONAR_TOKEN" ]]; then
          GRADLE_ARGS="${GRADLE_ARGS} sonarqube -Dsonar.projectKey=xenit-eu_alfresco-docker-gradle-plugin -Dsonar.organization=xenit-eu -Dsonar.host.url=https://sonarcloud.io -Dsonar.login=$SONAR_TOKEN"
        fi
        ./gradlew $GRADLE_ARGS

    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: rm -f $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock

  deploy:
    needs: test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      with:
        fetch-depth: 0

    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'
        cache: 'gradle'

    - name: Make gradlew executable
      run: chmod +x gradlew

    - name: Publish Gradle plugin
      env:
        GRADLE_PUBLISH_KEY: ${{ secrets.GRADLE_PUBLISH_KEY }}
        GRADLE_PUBLISH_SECRET: ${{ secrets.GRADLE_PUBLISH_SECRET }}
      run: ./gradlew publishPlugins -Pgradle.publish.key=$GRADLE_PUBLISH_KEY -Pgradle.publish.secret=$GRADLE_PUBLISH_SECRET -x check

OUTPUT RULES
- Output YAML only (no prose). Your output MUST start with "name:" and include top-level keys: name, on, jobs.
- Include at least one job with: runs-on, steps.
- Do NOT output a snippet (must not start with "- uses:" or "- run:").

CONVERSION RULES
- Preserve semantics: env (global/matrix), caches, services/addons, branch/tag filters, deploys, notifications.
- Map Travis lifecycle to GHA steps: before_install, install, before_script, script, after_success/failure, deploy.
- Map matrices: jdk/node_js/python/go -> strategy.matrix; allow_failures -> continue-on-error.
- Env: env.global -> env (workflow/job/step). $FOO secrets -> ${{ secrets.FOO }}.
- Caches: cache: directories -> actions/cache@v4 with stable keys.
- Services/addons: services (dbs) -> jobs.<job>.services; addons.apt -> apt-get steps.
- Docker/Compose: preserve docker build/push and docker-compose up/down; keep wait loops verbatim.
- Triggers: preserve original branch/tag names; do not invent "main" or "master".
- Use modern actions: actions/checkout@v4; actions/setup-java@v4 (distribution: temurin), setup-node@v4, setup-python@v5, setup-go@v5.
- Do NOT introduce tools/registries not in the source (Buildx, login actions, GHCR, Sonar, custom email actions). If no 1:1 equivalent, add a short "# TODO:" comment.
- Prefer compact flow style for simple event lists. Use on: [push, pull_request] instead of multiline empty mappings.
- Do not leave empty event mappings.
- If branch/tag filters are required, switch to the expanded form for that event only.


Now migrate below input section Travis CI configuration to equivalent complete GitHub Actions workflow and return ONLY the complete migrated YAML maintaining the above OUTPUT and CONVERSION rules.
input:
language: android
jdk: oraclejdk8

android:

  components:
    - tools
    - platform-tools
    - tools
    - build-tools-30.0.3
    - android-30
    - extra-android-m2repository
    - extra-google-m2repository
    - extra-android-support

  licenses:
      - 'android-sdk-preview-license-.+'
      - 'android-sdk-license-.+'
      - 'google-gdk-license-.+'

before_install:
  - chmod +x gradlew
  - yes | sdkmanager "platforms;android-30"

script:
  - ./gradlew clean build
  - ./gradlew testDebugUnitTestCoverage coveralls

cache:

  directories:
    - $HOME/.m2
    - $HOME/.gradle/caches/
    - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/
output:
name: Android CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'
        cache: 'gradle'

    - name: Set up Android SDK
      uses: android-actions/setup-android@v3

    - name: Install Android components and accept licenses
      run: |
        yes | sdkmanager "tools" "platform-tools" "build-tools;30.0.3" "platforms;android-30" "extras;android;m2repository" "extras;google;m2repository" "extras;android;support"
        yes | sdkmanager --licenses

    - name: Make gradlew executable
      run: chmod +x gradlew

    - name: Build
      run: ./gradlew clean build

    - name: Test coverage
      run: ./gradlew testDebugUnitTestCoverage coveralls

language: java

before_install: chmod +x gradlew

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      
      - name: Set up JDK 8

          java-version: '8'
